strengths: 16+ years of fullstack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud infrastructure — well above the 6-year minimum
Direct AI agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) development experience at re:cinq, matching the job's AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture demonstrated through TDD practice, workshops, and open-source testing tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: Active career gap since October 2025 (~8 months at time of evaluation) with no stated reason beyond 'career gap'
Nest.js and Vitest — two primary stack technologies — are absent from the resume, raising questions about depth in these specific tools
Kotlin experience appears minimal and incidental (robotic arms at Altom), not aligned with the secondary backend services use case described in the JD
response.justification: Bogdan brings exceptional breadth and depth as a fullstack engineer with a strong match on the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) and rare direct experience building AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which is explicitly required and often hard to find. The main friction points are the ~8-month unexplained career gap, the absence of Nest.js and Vitest on the resume despite their centrality to the role's stack, and weak Kotlin exposure. Overall the technical profile is a strong fit for the engineering expectations of the role.
